topic_name: Exploring the Psyche: Inner Journeys and Emotional Experiences
texts: detachment as though my body was in one box, mind in another and my anxjety came from thst lack of control
i was struggling because my mind would go back to a stringof thoughts andtoget out of it i had to take avery deep breath.
the same set of thoughts occured thrice andiinhaled really deep to get past it.
i was a little afraid at thinking of the gas chambers.
i became a white egret from a dream last week.
then i t felt like a typeof death experience as i decended into the underworld.
i felyt myself go down through the layers of the earth into a moss land.
then things changed and it became very pink and i was in the clouds.
then i became a mantaray and drifted.
i was awake the whole time i could not relax or switch off
constant thoughts coming towards me as i batted them away into the sky
It was something very familiar to the soul but not...
It felt like a journey through the cosmos.
i thought i was drifting in space .
breathing is hard
i arrived stressed so it took zwhile to relax.
I turned into a mermaid and watched them on the land as I swam away with turtles, fishes.
felt as though i was moving through a tunnel at first.
towards end in darkness, i felt i was being wrapped in metal, in strips
It felt like I was deep in the ocean.
I wasn't drowning, instead it felt like that's where I was meant to be.
i felt intensely anxious and a bit suffocated but also knowing that i've got this.
I saw myself flaring, whirling, in water, in the air, becoming one withwhat I floated in
i felt like my body kept sinking or dropping to another level... into the seat and into itself
i tried hard to immerse into the dreamstate but failed.
And it also felt like being inside an ocean.
I also felt numb and tingly throughout it at different points.
it was near impossible to keep eyes open

the thought of this not working
but in the dream
in another place
woman next to me was sniffing so had to move and was difficult to get back in

texts: not sure what the puroose of it was except being with the muxic certainly not inuced to sleep dream state as bpm too high, otherwise interesting but co fusing experience, not much visions either, do t think the lights were in sy c too to , to go with music well....
thus should be available for everyone all the time
some visuals of trees, heat,sun likeexperience
Peacefulness and calm.
relaxed and peaceful, felt the beats of the music

some thoughts about mundane everyday things like work, but mainly felt relaxed ansd able to float into a dreamlike place

some visuals ofspace and deep ocean
Complete relaxation,peace of mind and ready to face whatever happens
We have 86 billion neurons, no wonder we can have psychedelic experiences.
The complexity of the brain can produce a limitless spectrum of experience, from depression to enlightenment.
Got many vivid visions, saw lots of colours, my bedroom, old TV shows, videogames, cities...

Vibration in visuals
Centered in body
Aware of sounds 
Mind realty quietened down
places and waves and an animal
calming sounds, rising elation, curiosity and connection.
an acceptance of being in a stressful time but self jubilation and inspiration.
i made up stories in my head in  a rrative way imagining being on a spa eship with aliens communicating  via sounds and colours and this was nice escapism from stress
i love all of it the feling was amazing and i would come back i fell aslep and wake up with fresh mindset
deep relaxation close to falling asleep

a swivelling vortex of sound
the loneliness of the moon
a jacuzzi of lightness

it is like i am in a dream, in a movie
no one there, not even me
just my mind have been to there
flying through a lot of shape, light, space
there is a moment ..
i feel like i was draw back to my body and the environment
my thought has been to somewhere no one have been to
i cant realise have long was that experience
it was so quick
in and then out
i dont feel the time.

physical heaviness
physical lightness
i didn't experience visual or aural so-called  "hallucitions"
it was relaxing
a bit hot to start
Relaxed  just about to sleep when  music or colour chqnged
First drowning in that sound, then learning how to swim and enjoy it and heal
an unique experience that teach us how simple could be to recconnect with our primitive way to feel emotions trough sounds and colours
I also felt like i was dreaming of random objects and my started to create stories like if does when i am dreaming.it felt like a drug trip at some points.
A sense of ture, the ocean and the beach, sunrise and sunsets and futher along into space and filly back to the deepest ocean.

Blue

coming  closer

a baby

topic_name: Exploration of Color Perception and Imagery in a Dark Environment
texts: thecoloursmade patterns when i had my eyes closec - almost like a weave of colours in a woollen fabric
once i went past that it was blank.
It was a bit weird, i know that mybrain is trying to create something by itself, i felt different things based on the colour.
i saw a different cokour to the lights that were in the centre when i closed my eyes
i met a being, long and blue, with not much of a defined form.
i mostly saw grey geometric shapes
At some point started experimenting and trying to recall the images I liked.
i opened my eyesbut thought the centrelights were mild and not that impressive.
the colors i sawwhen my eyes were shut very brief, fleeting and hues, nebulous, no specific patterns
i didnot exoperience  visuals znd colours.
i enjoyed the  colours on ceiling.
I saw concave and convex and thehot orange os cillating of being insice avolcano
I was in a land (not anywhere on Earth) it was another plannet, with animals, but they were not the usual colours - a yellow elephant, a blue gorilla.
The colours behind my closed eyes swapped to the opposite colour or the colour spectrum of that on the screen
It was dark, but also a brilliant blue.
I can't recognise the color actually, but I can feel the light dimming.
i did not see anything except for the flickering lights.
I had no sense of tge grating sounds towards the end exceot they were the colour   turquoise which gradualky turned to black and nothingness.
i saw a starry night and being in blue warm water and a blue butterfly
Interested to  experience different darkness when different colours were projected.
had my eyes shut most of the time, was aware of colours changing
i saw a lot of imagery and colours, especially images of water, ripples of water, snowscapes, drops of water falling.

topic_name: Exploring Personal Connections and Reflections through Meditation
texts: there was abeing there call eveleryn.
i asked him how i was doing and about my husband.
I had a vision of string theory - that everything in the physical world is connected by invisible string particles and concatetions.
i quite enjoyed the experience.
Initially, I was interested how others were reacting around me.
I want one of these at home
Like I am part of something bigger
helped me with my meditation journey
Windows into my busy life.
Flashes of my past, seeing my lovely Mum.
My partner, Dad, my sister, niece and nephew, my friends.
still feeling it now.
My thoughts were about connecting with others
Looking to the past to alyse my future.
it filled my mind
i think i ought to experience it once  more to see if it changes.
i felt connected.
i was everywhere...
i was interested to see what would happen next!
I saw past experiences and reflected on my choices.
i saw new scenes and reflected on opportunities.

topic_name: Embodied Experience of Music-Induced Altered States
texts: At times I felt transported to a meadow full of flowers in spring, and then the sound of the bells took me to a mountaintop.
I tried to really focus on the listening and in doing so the music and my imagition took me to different places.
At one point I think I was milking a cow in a field with someone playing the piano.
The music  conjured up images of Buddists and  other spiritual people ...
At that point I felt I'd left my body - fully immersed in the sound and light.
The music took me on a whole journey, I was completrly surrounded.
Music wasn't just in the space, it was the space.
Thick hot air saturated with the soundwaves which I was inhaling.
my visual expirence would change a lot with the music.
I became more and more relaxed as the music progressed further with its journey.
emptiness in my mind, i was consumed by the power of the music.
As the music pace and volume increased, i saw horses galloping at increasing speed and zt some point, i was on a horse too.

As the pace gathefed further, i was on a 
train, speed ing tgrough countryside , then through time and space until the muic reach a climax.
i watched the room rise and fall with the music.
